container.heading: Control and Operation of Taxicabs in the City of Cumberland and the City of Hagerstown

annotations.annotation: Regulation .04 amended effective September 2, 1991 (18:17 Md. R. 1921)
Regulation .15 amended effective September 2, 1991 (18:17 Md. R. 1921)
Regulation .15D amended effective February 28, 1994 (21:4 Md. R. 278); August 15, 1994 (21:16 Md. R. 1391); February 8, 1999 (26:3 Md. R. 176)
Regulation .15E repealed effective February 28, 1994 (21:4 Md. R. 278)
Regulation .15K amended effective December 24, 2001 (28:25 Md. R. 2193)
Regulation .16E adopted effective September 28, 1992 (19:19 Md. R. 1713)
Regulation .17 amended effective January 23, 2012 (39:1 Md. R. 21)
Regulation .17A amended effective April 10, 1995 (22:7 Md. R. 538)
Regulation .18 repealed and new Regulation .18 adopted effective January 20, 1992 (19:1 Md. R. 34)
Regulation .18A amended effective June 15, 1998 (25:12 Md. R. 948)
Regulation .18B amended and C adopted effective December 19, 1994 (21:25 Md. R. 2110)
Regulation .18B amended effective December 24, 2001 (28:25 Md. R. 2193)
Regulation .18C amended effective February 13, 2006 (33:3 Md. R. 244)
Chapter repealed effective April 9, 2018 (45:7 Md. R. 346)
